title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical and feedback-driven process of Continuous Internal Evaluation for an Algorithms course, showing how various assessment components inform learning and teaching adjustments.
relationships: Sequential flow with feedback loops from 'Student Feedback & Performance Analysis' and 'Final Summative Evaluation' back to 'Instructor Review & Adjustment' to modify future 'Initial Lecture & Concept Introduction'
